assertions.title: Cmd+Click selects multiple employees with visual indicator

steps.action: In OrgChartView, hold Cmd and click Alice, Bob, and Cara cards
steps.expected: All three cards selected with visual state and selection count shown
steps.observed: UI displayed '3 selected' and bulk action bar while the three cards were selected

evidence.network: Selection-only interaction; no employee write requests expected

assertions.title: Shift+Click range select in list views

steps.action: In HierarchyView, click first employee then Shift+Click later employee
steps.expected: All rows between first and last are selected
steps.observed: Selection stayed at '1 selected' (range did not apply)

steps.action: In SpreadsheetView, repeat Shift+Click range selection
steps.observed: Only a single row was selected; no inclusive range selection

evidence.network: No relevant API calls; failure observed in client-side selection behavior

assertions.issues: Shift+Click range selection could not be reproduced in either HierarchyView or SpreadsheetView; only single-item selection occurred.

assertions.title: Lasso/marquee select in OrgChartView

steps.action: Drag selection rectangle on chart background over multiple cards
steps.observed: Selection rectangle appeared during drag, but no employees were selected after release

steps.action: Retry with larger marquee covering all visible cards
steps.observed: Still no selected-count indicator and no selected cards

evidence.network: No relevant API calls; failure observed in client-side selection behavior

assertions.issues: Marquee drag did not result in card selection on release.

assertions.title: Deselect via Cmd+Click, Escape, or clicking empty canvas

steps.expected: That employee deselects while others remain selected
steps.observed: Count dropped from 3 selected to 2 selected
Selection count and bulk bar disappeared

steps.action: With multi-selection active, click empty canvas area
steps.observed: Selection count and bulk bar disappeared after canvas click

evidence.network: Selection-only interaction; no employee write requests expected

assertions.title: Selection count and bulk action menu

steps.expected: Selection count and bulk actions visible
steps.observed: UI showed '3 selected' with Update Department/Level/Status/Change Manager/Delete actions
Selection count and bulk action UI disappeared when nothing selected

evidence.network: Selection-only interaction; no employee write requests expected

steps.expected: Three employees from different departments are selected

steps.action: Bulk Update Department to Engineering and submit
steps.expected: All three employees update to Engineering
steps.observed: OrgChart updated to Engineering for Alice, Bob, and Cara
Spreadsheet rows show Alice/Bob/Cara department = Engineering

frictions.description: Spreadsheet row elements were not exposed in standard interactive snapshots; range-selection validation required AG Grid DOM-targeted interactions for verification.
frictions.resolution: Used DOM-level row targeting in SpreadsheetView to confirm selected row behavior.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-MULTI-001, 004, 005, 006) and 2 failed (VAL-MULTI-002 shift-range select, VAL-MULTI-003 lasso select).
